{{documentation}}
<pre>{{Quest details
|desc = The official description of the quest (either from the 3-second pop-up in the game or in the cache).
|start = The starting point/action of the quest.
|qtpye = Type of the quest, can be '''primary''' or '''secondary'''.
|req = Quest requirement of the quest. Can be deleted if there is no quest requirement.
|item_req = * Required items to finish the quest. Can be deleted if there is no required item.
|rec = * Recommended items, which help during the quest. Can be deleted if there is no recommended item.
|enemies = * Enemies that the player has to defeat to complete the quest. Can be deleted if there is no enemies to defeat.
}}</pre>
